description: Live-ops dashboard. Current panels are freshness-bounded live state; selected-range panels are operational history. Filter values are scoped to live-video/streaming domains, and identity/display joins use api_orchestrator_identity for enrichment when needed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state
WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
AND stream_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), ifNull(orch_address, '')))

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
)
SELECT s.stream_id AS "Stream ID",
    s.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    if(ifNull(labels.orch_label, '') != '', labels.orch_label, ifNull(nullIf(s.orch_address, ''), 'unresolved')) AS "Orchestrator",
    ifNull(s.pipeline, 'unknown') AS "Pipeline",
    s.gateway AS "Gateway",
    s.attribution_status AS "Attribution Status",
    round(ifNull(s.output_fps, 0), 2) AS "FPS",
    s.state AS "State",
    toUInt64(greatest(dateDiff('second', s.sample_ts, now()), 0)) AS "Last Sample Age (s)"
FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state s
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = s.orch_address
WHERE s.last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
AND s.stream_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), s.org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), s.orch_address))
ORDER BY "Last Sample Age (s)" ASC, "FPS" DESC
LIMIT 100

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label, org
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
visible_orch AS (
    SELECT orch_address
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
    WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
      AND (
            ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '')
         OR orch_address GLOBAL IN (
                SELECT DISTINCT orch_address
                FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
                WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
                  AND hardware_present = 1
                  AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
                  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
            )
      )
),
active_counts AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, countDistinct(stream_id) AS active_streams
    FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state
    WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
    AND stream_id != ''
    AND attribution_status = 'resolved' AND length(ifNull(orch_address, '')) > 0
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
    GROUP BY addr
)
SELECT ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(o.orch_address, 8), '...', right(o.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator Label",
    toUInt64(ifNull(a.active_streams, 0)) AS "Active Streams"
FROM visible_orch o
LEFT JOIN active_counts a ON a.addr = o.orch_address
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = o.orch_address
ORDER BY "Active Streams" DESC, "Orchestrator Label" ASC
LIMIT 12

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
active_paths AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, gateway,
        ifNull(nullIf(pipeline, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
        countDistinct(stream_id) AS active_streams,
        round(avg(output_fps), 2) AS avg_fps
    FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state
    WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
    AND stream_id != ''
    AND attribution_status = 'resolved' AND length(ifNull(orch_address, '')) > 0
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
    GROUP BY addr, gateway, pipeline
)
SELECT ifNull(gateway, 'unknown') AS "From",
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(a.addr, 8), '...', right(a.addr, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    a.addr AS "Orchestrator Address",
    a.pipeline AS "Pipeline",
    toUInt64(a.active_streams) AS "Current Active Streams",
    toFloat64(a.avg_fps) AS "Avg FPS"
FROM active_paths a
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = a.addr
WHERE ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), a.addr))
ORDER BY "Current Active Streams" DESC, "Avg FPS" DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Current Gateway -> Orchestrator -> Pipeline Paths (120s freshness)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE org != '' AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM (SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT canonical_model AS model_id FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE canonical_model != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE model_id != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE model_id != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))) AS models WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model

list.definition: WITH live_orch AS (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hardware_present = 1 AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orchestrator_address AS orch_address FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE orchestrator_address != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE orch_address != '' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))) SELECT i.orch_address AS __value, i.orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity i INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM live_orch) l ON l.orch_address = i.orch_address WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), i.org)) ORDER BY __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: SELECT concat(coalesce(nullIf(orch_label, ''), orch_address), ':',  orch_address) FROM naap.api_variable_orchestrators

title: NaaP: Live AI Video Operations
